prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为18036→19693→16787→19611→20503名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年（2023→2025）累计后移约3716名；2025年基准位次约20503 名，为近5年最高（即竞争最激烈的一年）；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年127人、2022年123人、2023年124人、2024年127人、2025年138人；2026年计划136人，较2025年减少2人，小幅缩招约1.45%，缩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字有减小压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，非985；软科中国大学排名2026 年约第67名，近年排名在54–67之间波动，整体处于全国中上游水平；学校声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第68位，评价为"一 般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；近年无投档线断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，安全科学与工程获评A+（全国顶尖），测绘 科学与技术获评A-，土木工程获评A-；安全工程、测绘类、土木类均为该校在湘招生专业，学科实力对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程 及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校招生专业高度重合，推高相关专业组竞争；本省物理类考生2026年约34.7万人，较2025年约32.0万人增加约8.4%， 考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争物理类本科批2025年405分较2024年422分下降17分，试卷难度或整体分数分布有所变化；中国矿业大学位于江苏徐州 ，非本省高校亦非邻省，在湖南省无特殊地域偏好优势；该校在湘招生计划占比较小，属跨省招生常规规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次20503名、2026年计划小幅缩 招2人（位次数字减小约178位）、本省物理类考生增加约8.4%（竞争加剧）以及学校排名略有下降等因素，缩招与考生增加的作用方向相反，但考生规模扩大对竞争的推升效应更 为显著；预测2026年最低位次约20475名，区间19975–20975名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 18036 → 19693 → 16787 → 19611 → 20503, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend. In the last 3 years (2023→2025), the ranking has declined by approximately 3716 positions. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 20503, the highest in the past 5 years (i.e., the most competitive year). The university's enrollment plan in Hunan for Physics Category was 127 in 2021, 123 in 2022, 124 in 2023, 127 in 2024, and 138 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 136, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.45%, which slightly intensifies competition and puts downward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, not a 985. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 67th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 54 and 67, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. The university's reputation is rated as neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 68th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no abnormal surge in application attention. There have been no records of cutoff line breaks in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Safety Science and Engineering was rated A+ (top nationally), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology was rated A-, and Civil Engineering was rated A-. Safety Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering are all majors recruited in Hunan, and the strength of these disciplines has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication are highly popular and recommended, overlapping significantly with the university's recruitment majors, thus increasing competition in related major groups. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from approximately 320,000 in 2025, expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. The undergraduate batch cutoff for Physics Category in 2025 was 405 points, down 17 points from 422 in 2024, indicating changes in exam difficulty or overall score distribution. China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a provincial or neighboring university, so it has no special regional preference advantage in Hunan. Its enrollment plan in Hunan is relatively small, typical for cross-provincial recruitment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 20503, the slight reduction of 2 places in the 2026 plan (ranking number decreases by about 178 positions), the increase of about 8.4% in provincial Physics Category candidates (intensified competition), and a slight decline in university ranking, the effects of reduced enrollment and increased candidates are opposite, but the impact of candidate expansion on competition is more significant. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 20475, with a range of 19975–20975.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19975–20975, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Safety Science and Engineering A+ discipline offers high cost-performance, Energy and Power has good prospects), use Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer Science) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Mining, Civil Engineering) as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 19975), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 3916 → 4534 → 4475 → 3781 → 3614, showing an overall U-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; in 2024–2025, rankings moved forward for two consecutive years (from 3781 to 3614), with the 2025 baseline ranking approximately 3614, the lowest in the past 5 years (i.e., the most competitive year); the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province was 19 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 16 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 17, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, a slight expansion of about 6.25%, which slightly eases competition and puts upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, not a 985; ranked approximately 67th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings fluctuating between 54 and 67, overall at the mid-to-upper level nationally; the university's reputation is evaluated as neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 68th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium level; no record of admission cutoff line breaks in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Safety Science and Engineering was rated A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology was rated A-, and Civil Engineering was rated A-; the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, English, etc.) do not directly correspond to the above advantageous disciplines, but the university's overall strong engineering background has limited impact on the application of liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a hot social popularity (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Finance/Economics is divided and wait-and-see, English/Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see; the number of History Category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 187,000, a significant increase of about 31.2% compared to about 143,000 in 2025, with the expanded candidate scale intensifying overall competition; the History Category undergraduate batch cutoff score in 2025 was 446 points, up 8 points from 438 points in 2024, reflecting intensified competition; China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a provincial university nor a neighboring province, with no special regional preference advantage in Hunan Province; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan is relatively small (16–20 people), which is a normal scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3614, the 2026 plan's slight expansion of 1 person (ranking number increases by about 136), and the significant increase of about 31.2% in History Category candidates in the province (competition significantly intensifies), the competitive pressure from the large expansion of candidate scale far outweighs the easing effect of the enrollment expansion; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 3830, with a range of 3330–4330.
